calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To (1) Declare Petitioner A Vexatious Litigant, (2) Require Petitioner To Furnish Security, And (3) Enter A Pre-Filing Order; Supporting Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Exhibits 1 To 31
Off Calendar Mar-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Petitioner IVAN VON STAICH, Tel No. 805-547-7900 appearing telephonically in pro per;
Deputy Attorney General AMANDA LLOYD of the State of California Office of the Attorney General, Tel No. 415-703-5848 appearing for Respondent Governor Edmund G. Brown.

The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear. Matter argued and submitted by parties. The Court takes under submission RESPONDENT GOVERNOR EDMUND G. BROWN'S Motion To (1) Declare Petitioner A Vexatious Litigant, (2) Require Petitioner To Furnish Security, And (3) Enter A Pre-Filing Order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To (1) Declare Petitioner A Vexatious Litigant, (2) Require Petitioner To Furnish Security, And (3) Enter A Pre-Filing Order; Supporting Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Exhibits 1 To 31
Off Calendar Feb-04-2016 Continued To Feb-18-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Petitioner IVAN VON STAICH appearing telephonically in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT GOVERNOR EDMUND G. BROWN'S Motion To (1) Declare Petitioner A Vexatious Litigant, (2) Require Petitioner To Furnish Security, And (3) Enter A Pre-Filing Order is continued to February 18, 2016 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion, to give respondent an opportunity to file a reply brief and to enable the Court to try to make arrangements with California Men's Colony-East so that petitioner may participate in the hearing by telephone. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

Motion Requesting Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith Issue Peremptory Writ Against Respondent Edmund G. Brown, Who Has Failed To Respond To Previously Failed Mandate Petition; And Respondent'S Failure To Review Petitioner'S July 30, 2012 Parole Approval Within 30 Days
Off Calendar Jan-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER IVAN VON STAICH'S Motion Requesting Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith Issue Peremptory Writ Against Respondent Edmund G. Brown, Who Has Failed To Respond To Previously Failed Mandate Petition; And Respondent's Failure To Review Petitioner's July 30, 2012 Parole Approval Within 30 Days is off calendar. Improper service.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/EG)
